title: pelargonium nitidum
intro: Pelargonium nitidum, also known as the glossy-leaved geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pelargonium. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium nitidum include its ability to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium nitidum can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
